_comment: claude.ai connectors are REMOTE, OAuth-backed MCP servers. The canonical way to enable them is the claude.ai Connectors directory (Settings -> Connectors) or `claude mcp add --transport http <name> <url>`. The URLs below are PLACEHOLDERS — replace each with the endpoint shown on the connector's page in the claude.ai Connectors directory. Auth is interactive OAuth on first use, so these may be absent in headless/cron runs.
